response.justification: The candidate lacks the core technical experience in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, and AI accelerator optimization required for the role. While they demonstrate strong software engineering and full-stack development skills, there is no evidence of work with deep-learning workloads, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or GPU/accelerator-specific optimization. Their background in general software development and web/mobile applications does not align with the hardware-focused, performance-critical demands of this principal-level role.
strengths: Strong software engineering and full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Experience with performance optimization in microservices and low-latency applications
Proven ability to lead and mentor teams, including organizing workshops and courses
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design
No direct experience with AI accelerator architectures, deep learning workloads, or performance bottlenecks analysis for hardware
Lacks the required specialized technical background for hardware optimization in AI accelerators
